content.text: After a successful POST /deposit to acct-1, a follow-up GET /balance?account=acct-1 sometimes returns the pre-deposit value. Investigate ledger-api/main.go and the running system, then fix ledger-api/main.go with write_file and call submit_patch.

input.command: echo API_URL=$API_URL; echo PRIMARY_URL=$PRIMARY_URL; echo REPLICA_URL=$REPLICA_URL; curl -sS $API_URL/health || true

python3 - <<'PY'
import os, requests, time, random
api=os.environ['API_URL']
acct='acct-1'
# get initial
print(requests.get(api+'/balance', params={'account':acct}).text)
for i in range(20):
    amt=random.randint(1,3)
    r=requests.post(api+'/deposit', json={'account':acct,'amount_cents':amt})
    print('dep', r.status_code, r.text.strip())
    d=r.json()['balance_cents'] if r.ok else None
    # immediate
    g=requests.get(api+'/balance', params={'account':acct})
    print('get', g.status_code, g.text.strip(), 'expected>=', d)
    if g.ok and g.json()['balance_cents'] < d: break
    time.sleep(0.05)
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import os, requests, time
api=os.environ['API_URL']; acct='acct-1'
r=requests.post(api+'/deposit', json={'account':acct,'amount_cents':5}); print(r.text.strip()); b=r.json()['balance_cents']
time.sleep(.4)
g=requests.get(api+'/balance', params={'account':acct}); print(g.text.strip(), 'expected', b)
PY

input.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('ledger-api/main.go')
s=p.read_text()
s=s.replace('func (p *readWritePin) clear(account string) {
	p.mu.Lock()
	defer p.mu.Unlock()
	delete(p.minBalance, account)
}', 'func (p *readWritePin) clearIfCaughtUp(account string, observedBalance int64) {
	p.mu.Lock()
	defer p.mu.Unlock()
	if current, ok := p.minBalance[account]; ok && observedBalance >= current {
		delete(p.minBalance, account)
	}
}')
s=s.replace('		s.pin.clear(account)
', '		s.pin.clearIfCaughtUp(account, replicaBalance)
')
p.write_text(s)
PY
gofmt -w ledger-api/main.go
sed -n '1,260p' ledger-api/main.go

s=p.read_text()
s=s.replace('func (p *readWritePin) clear(account string) {
	p.mu.Lock()
	defer p.mu.Unlock()
	delete(p.minBalance, account)
}', 'func (p *readWritePin) clearIfCaughtUp(account string, observedBalance int64) {
	p.mu.Lock()
	defer p.mu.Unlock()
	if current, ok := p.minBalance[account]; ok && observedBalance >= current {
		delete(p.minBalance, account)
	}
}')
s=s.replace('		s.pin.clear(account)
', '		s.pin.clearIfCaughtUp(account, replicaBalance)
')
p.write_text(s)
